breaks.description: HQLA reference data is stale, causing incorrect security classifications
breaks.root_cause: HQLA eligibility file not updated since last business day
breaks.recommended_action: Refresh HQLA reference data from DTCC feed

breaks.description: Positions silently excluded by ingestion filters in target system
breaks.root_cause: Silent filter FWD_START_NULL_EXCL excluding valid positions
breaks.recommended_action: Review filter configuration and add audit logging
